description: APT29 used encoded PowerShell launcher (T1059.001) to drop Cobalt Strike beacon via malicious Word macro.
APT28 leveraged spear-phishing with credential harvesting lures targeting Exchange admins (T1566.001).
Lockbit ransomware exploited public-facing web app for initial access then deployed T1486 data encryption.
Valid accounts (T1078) reused from a third-party breach allowed APT29 lateral movement into O365 tenants.
FIN7 exploited SQL injection in a public-facing e-commerce app (T1190) to plant web shells.
Lockbit affiliate reused stolen RDP credentials (T1078) to chain T1021.002 for persistence.
MuddyWater used Atera Ranger for command and control (T1219) targeting regional telecoms.
Unknown actor abused exposed SharePoint vulnerability for unauthenticated remote code execution.
APT28 deployed Impacket-style WMI exec (T1047) for lateral movement after phishing foothold.
Lockbit-v3 affiliate exfiltrated via T1567 (exfil-to-cloud storage) prior to T1486 encryption.
